New Plexity computer update is insane. Perplexity just dropped a new update and it is insane. They just turned Slack into a full AI command center. No extra tabs, no copy pasting, no switching apps. You just tell the AI what to do inside your team chat and it does the whole thing for you. This is brand new. It is big and I am going to break it all down for you right now. So here is what just happened. Perplexity released something called Perplexity Computer. And if you have not heard of it yet, stick around because this is going to change how you work. A Plexity computer is not just another chatbot. It is not like typing a question and getting an answer. No, this thing is an AI agent. That means it does not just answer you. It actually goes and does the work. It breaks big tasks into small steps. It runs multiple AI models at the same time. It can work for hours on its own without you touching anything. It connects to other apps. It writes reports. It does research. It builds things. Think of it like hiring a digital worker that never sleeps and never complains. That is Perplexity Computer. But here is where it gets crazy. And this is the part that blew my mind. They just made it work inside Slack. Yes, Slack. The app your whole team already uses every single day. You do not have to open a new tab. You do not have to go to a different website. You do not have to copy and paste anything anywhere. You just type a message in Slack and the AI does everything right there. Let me show you exactly how this works and why it matters. Because trust me, once you see this, you are not going back to the old ways. So the first thing you can do is run full AI workflows straight from Slack. You just tag the AI in your channel and tell it what you need in there. For example, you could say, "Hey computer, create a competitor analysis report for Tesla and BYD. Use recent news and market data and give me a slide outline." That is it. You type that in Slack and then the AI goes and does the research. It pulls the data. It analyzes everything. and it puts together a full report and it drops the results right back into your Slack channel. You did not leave Slack once. You did not open a single other tool. That right there is a game changer. But wait, it gets even better. The second thing is that the AI can read your Slack channels for context. So let us say your team has been talking about a product launch in a channel. There are messages going back and forth, ideas, feedback, decisions. You can just tell the AI to look at that conversation and it will generate a summary, an action plan, and a full launch timeline based on what your team already said. You do not have to explain anything to the AI. It already knows what is going on because it read the chat. That saves you so much time. It is ridiculous. Hey, if we have not met already, I am the digital avatar of Julian Goldie, CEO of Goldie Agency. Whilst he is helping clients get more leads and customers, I am here to help you get the latest AI updates. Julian Goldie reads every single comment, so make sure you drop one below. Now, here is where it gets really wild, and I need you to pay attention to this part. You can build recurring workflows inside Slack. So, you could say something like, "Hey, computer, every Monday, summarize this channel, generate a KPI dashboard, and post the summary to the leadership channel, and it will just do that every single Monday automatically. You set it up once, and it runs forever." That is like having a project manager that works for free and never forgets anything. All right, so let me keep going because there is more. Everything you do in Slack with Perplexity computer automatically syncs to the web version. So if you start a task in Slack, you can check on it later from your laptop or your phone on the Plexity website. The tasks keep running. The files stay there. The workflows do not disappear. It all stays connected no matter where you are or what device you're using. That is huge for teams that work remote or across different time zones. Now, let me tell you why this update is such a big deal. Because I know some of you are thinking, "Okay, cool. It works in Slack. So what? Here is the so what." Right now, most people use AI like this. They go to Slack, they see a question or a task, they copy it, they open a new tab, they paste it into an AI tool, they wait for the answer, they copy the answer, they go back to Slack, they paste it. That is like six steps just to get one thing done. With this update, you skip all of that. You just ask the AI in Slack and it is done. One step, that is it. The amount of time this saves across a whole team is massive. And here is the thing that I think most people are missing. This is not just about saving time. This is about AI becoming a teammate. Think about it. Before this update, AI was something one person used on their own. You go to a website, uh you type a prompt, you get your answer. Nobody else on your team sees it. Nobody else benefits from it. But now with this Slack integration, the AI is sitting right there in your team chat. Your marketing person can ask it for analytics. Your developer can ask it for code. Your founder can ask it for research all in the same channel all at the same time. The AI becomes part of the team. That is where things are heading. And this is just the beginning. Go check it out. All right, let me show you some real examples of what you can do with this because I want you to see how powerful it is. Example one, research agent. You type in Slack, hey computer, research the AI startup market, find the top 10 companies, create a comparison table, and summarize the key trends. and it comes back with a full research report, a data table and insights all inside Slack. You did not open a single other app. Example two, channel summarizer. You say, "Hey, computer, summarize this Slack channel. Highlight key decisions and list action items." Boom. You get a clean summary of everything your team talked about. This is perfect for when you miss a meeting or when a channel gets too busy to read through. Example three, AI project manager. You say, "Hey computer, plan a YouTube launch campaign, create a timeline, assign tasks, and generate content ideas." And it builds the whole plan for you inside Slack. Where your team can see it and start working on it immediately. Example four, code assistant. You say, "Hey computer, build a simple landing page for an AI newsletter. Generate the HTML and the copy." And it does it right there in your chat. Your developer does not even have to open their code editor to get started. &gt;&gt; [snorts] &gt;&gt; Now, let me tell you where I think this is all going. Because this Slack integration is not the end, it is the start. We are moving into a world where AI agents live inside all of our work tools. Not just Slack, but project management apps, email, calendars, everything. The AI will not just answer questions. It will run entire projects, product launches, research campaigns, content creation, marketing, all of it. Handled by AI agents working inside the tools you already use. And the people and the businesses that start using this stuff now are the ones who are going to be way ahead of everyone else. That is just how it works. Early movers win. So, let me recap. Perplexity Computer is an AI agent that does real work for you. The new Slack integration lets you run it inside your team chat. You can trigger workflows, use channel context, build recurring automations, and everything syncs to the web.
